stemHtml:
Refer to figure or ALICANTE - charts10-3A from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
What is the correct procedure for the SID CATON 2C?

options.a: 3100 feet or higher at D9.5 ALT, FL 110 or higher at VILNA, FL110 or higher at NARGO, not above FL 230 at CATON
options.b: 3100 feet or higher at D9.5, FL 80 or higher at VILNA, FL110 or higher at NARGO, not above FL 230 at CATON
options.c: 3500 feet at D9.5 ALT, not above FL 80 at VILNA, Leval at FL 110 NARGO and FL 230 at CATON
options.d: Runway heading to 4500 ft then above FL 80 at VILNA, above FL 110 at NARGO and not above FL 230 at CATON.
